mention.text: @CursorSupport I paid for Pro but Cursor still says I'm on the free plan. I already tried signing out and back in. Can someone help?

triage.summary: User paid for Cursor Pro but UI still shows free plan. Needs billing status verification; provided sources cover general billing management but not this specific sync/display mismatch.

suggested_response: Route to a human billing-support owner. Publicly avoid diagnosing from AI. Ask the user to email hi@cursor.com with: the email on their Cursor account and the purchase/receipt info (and optionally a screenshot of the plan banner). Check the subscription status on the account and reconcile any billing entitlement vs. plan display.
suggested_reply: Please email hi@cursor.com so the team can check your subscription and entitlement—your account is still showing the Free plan after payment. Include the email you used for Cursor and (if you have it) your receipt/order info, plus a screenshot of the plan banner. We’ll get it corrected if the billing status didn’t sync properly.

link to post: https://x.com/himarkyi/status/2050708722662650323
sources: https://cursor.com/help/account-and-billing/billing, https://cursor.com/help/account-and-billing/pricing, https://cursor.com/help/account-and-billing/cancel

fallback.reason: The available Cursor help sources cover general pricing/billing management, but they don’t provide a doc-backed fix for a ‘paid but still shows free’ plan-display mismatch.
fallback.manual_next_step: Escalate to billing support via hi@cursor.com and request only the account email + minimal proof of purchase; then verify and reconcile the subscription/entitlement status for that account.

sop_tags: no sensitive info in public reply
